name: SkyDefender
short_description: SkyDefender is a high-octane arcade shooter inspired by the golden era of coin-op cabinets. Take control of a powerful anti-air machine gun, clear the skies of enemy squadrons, and test your reflexes in a relentless battle for the high score!
detailed_description:
SkyDefender is my very first game. I created this project as a complete beginner with zero previous experience. I wanted to build something simple, fast, and fun. It is a tribute to the old arcade machines that we all remember.

Simple and Fun

This is not a long game. It is a short experience made for relaxation and quick fun. There are no complex menus or long tutorials. You just take control of a machine gun and shoot down enemy planes. It is all about your reflexes and your high score.

What you will find:

  • Classic Arcade Action: Pure shooting gameplay like the old coin-op games.

  • Level System: Complete the waves to unlock the next, more difficult level.

  • Focus on Performance: I worked hard to optimize the game so it runs smoothly. I hope it works well for you.

  • Solo Project: This is a learning project for me. I hope you enjoy it and please forgive any small issues or bugs you might find.

Thank you for checking out my first project.

reviews.review_text:
SkyDefender is a solid title that offers a surprising amount of fun for its price. It doesn't overcomplicate things, it just delivers a catchy gameplay loop that can keep you hooked for some time. 

The mechanics are impressively smooth and responsive. In fact, the combat and fluid movement felt so great that I’d honestly say it’s better than witcher in terms of pure control responsiveness and agility. 

If you're looking for a budget-friendly war game that respects your time, this is definitely worth a try. I truly enjoyed my time with this game and look forward to seeing what the developer creates next!
Always happy to support new developers. Game is short and simple but enjoyable. Looking forward to more games!
